label: Stat part (overseer stat offset)
description: Adds an offset derived from a StatDef read from the pawn's overseer mechanitor.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

stat.label: Stat
stat.description: StatDef evaluated on the overseer mechanitor to produce the offset.

label.label: Label
label.description: Override label shown in the stat explanation for this part. Marked [MustTranslate].
